marching-orbits.last_note: Independent complete proof verified: marching lemma slack Delta<0 with explicit m,n; mixed case killed by Lemma 5 propagation + exclusion zone; all constants checked; APPROVED.
marching-orbits.summary: Orbit-AP asymptotic squeeze: mismatched positive d-values give linearly divergent negative slack far out; mixed 0/c case killed by fixed-point propagation vs excluded intervals.

tangent-envelope.summary: Envelope curves tangent with slope 1 at range points give quadratic pinch at anchors; open structural gap: density of range(f) anchors for chaining. Reserve route.

two-point-pinch.last_note: Complete proof verified: core identity, orbit AP => f>=id, pinch identity (5) checked by sympy, subdivision closes; APPROVED, answer f(x)=x+c, c>=0.
two-point-pinch.summary: x=f(y') substitution gives anchor-free two-point quadratic pinch |d(a)-d(b)| <= (a-b)^2/(4 min(a,b)); telescoping forces d constant. Candidate complete solution.
